Tree Node Builder + Datagrid Proposal

Create a local TreeView node under the selected parent, describe the real-world context, then generate a contextual datagrid template, 5 dummy rows, and an AI handoff prompt. Saved nodes live in browser storage until exported. v2.9 preserves the v2.7.1 local-node rule: recommended object folders stay in proposal metadata and are not automatically added as visible child folders.
